args.query:
SELECT
  TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM o.OwnerId) as AgentId,
  AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', CAST(SUBSTR(o.CreatedDate, 1, 10) AS DATE), CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE))) as AvgTurnaround
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c 
  ON TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM o.ContractID__c) = TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM c.Id)
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate <= '2023-04-30'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY AvgTurnaround ASC
LIMIT 5;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT
  TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM o.OwnerId) as AgentId,
  AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', CAST(SUBSTR(o.CreatedDate, 1, 10) AS DATE), CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE))) as AvgTurnaround
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c 
  ON TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM o.ContractID__c) = TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM c.Id)
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate <= '2023-04-30'
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY AvgTurnaround ASC
LIMIT 5;
